ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment model */,
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of equipment (e.g., excavators, dozers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the equipment model */,
  "discontinued_date" TEXT /* Discontinued date of the equipment model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Manufacturer ID of the equipment model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the equipment */,
  "model_category" TEXT /* Category of the equipment model (e.g., heavy, medium, light) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_equipment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the equipment type (e.g., construction, mining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine size */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the engine size belongs to */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the engine */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the engine size (e.g., liters, cubic inches) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_powers" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross power */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the gross power belongs to */,
  "power" REAL /* Gross power of the equipment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the gross power (e.g., kW, hp) */,
  "gross_power_type" TEXT /* Type of gross power (e.g., maximum, minimum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gross_powers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_torques" (
  "torque_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross torque */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the gross torque belongs to */,
  "torque" REAL /* Gross torque of the equipment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the gross torque (e.g., Nm, ft. – lb.) */,
  "gross_torque_type" TEXT /* Type of gross torque (e.g., maximum, minimum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("torque_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gross_torques_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating weight */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the operating weight belongs to */,
  "weight" REAL /* Operating weight of the equipment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the operating weight (e.g., kg, lb.) */,
  "operating_weight_type" TEXT /* Type of operating weight (e.g., minimum, maximum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_weights_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grapple_capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grapple capacity */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the grapple capacity belongs to */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum grapple capacity of the equipment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the grapple capacity (e.g., m2, sq. ft.) */,
  "grapple_type" TEXT /* Type of grapple (e.g., hydraulic, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grapple_capacities_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axle_types" (
  "axle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the axle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the axle type */,
  "axle_category" TEXT /* Category of the axle type (e.g., drive axle, steering axle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axle_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axle configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the axle configuration belongs to */,
  "axle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the axle type used in the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the axle configuration */,
  "axle_config_type" TEXT /* Type of axle configuration (e.g., standard, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_axle_configs_axle_id FOREIGN KEY ("axle_id") REFERENCES axle_types ("axle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_axle_configs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compare_options" (
  "compare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compare option */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the compare option belongs to */,
  "option" TEXT /* Compare option (e.g., Compare) */,
  "compare_type" TEXT /* Type of compare option (e.g., side-by-side, overlay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_options_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, sales team, customer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the equipment specifications */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment specifications were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the equipment model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment model version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., manual, brochure) */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)
